_README: Per-client Amazon Ad/Sales Audit config. Copy to config.<client>-<market>.json (gitignored; only this TEMPLATE is committed). Fill every <...> placeholder. Paths in inputs{} may use ~ and repo-relative paths. Run: python tools/amazon-ad-audit/build_audit.py --config <this file> --preflight  → then --config <this file> to build. break-even ACOS is an ASSUMPTION until margin is confirmed; every red/amber verdict keys off it.
brand_tokens_note: Substring, case-insensitive. Include real misspellings that carry brand intent; do NOT include dictionary words that merely resemble the brand.
asin_groups_note: Optional. null or {} for an ungrouped single-line catalog. Groups map SQP files and Business-Report ASINs to product lines.
datadive_niche: <nicheId, or empty if no organic overlay>

inputs.datadive_niche_json: <path to saved DataDive niche keywords JSON (Claude pulls via MCP), or empty>
inputs.datadive_competitors_json: <optional path to DataDive competitors JSON, or empty>

delivery.drive_folder: <path to the client's Google Drive audit folder>
